subcodes.first_line: O ye lovers of the Beauty of the All-Merciful, and ye who are intoxicated with the spiritual wine, your senses are filled with the fragrances of the divine rose-garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عاشقان جمال رحمانی و ای مخموران صهبای روحانی مشامتان از نفحات گلشن الهی
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
